name: taruvi-refine-template
postCreateCommand: bash -lc '[ -f .mcp.json ] || cp .mcp.example.json .mcp.json; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; mkdir -p .codex/projects; source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; npm install --legacy-peer-deps; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @openai/codex'
postStartCommand: bash -lc '[ -f .mcp.json ] || cp .mcp.example.json .mcp.json; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; mkdir -p .codex/projects .codespace; source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null || true; nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null || true; nohup npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 >> /tmp/vite.log 2>&1 & disown'

postAttachCommand.codex: bash -lc 'until [ -f .codespace/.setup-complete ]; do sleep 2; done; source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null || true; nvm use 22 --silent 2>/dev/null || true; set -a; [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a; exec codex'

commands.name: ⚙️ Reopen .env
commands.tooltip: Reopen the .env file to check or update your Taruvi credentials

commands.name: 🔁 Retry Setup
commands.tooltip: Re-run Taruvi MCP and Codex configuration (use if setup failed or credentials changed)

commands.name: 👁️ Open Preview
commands.tooltip: Open the app preview — log in via the browser tab first if prompted

commands.name: 🤖 Codex CLI
commands.tooltip: Launch Codex CLI — sources .env so no manual key entry is needed
